name: Pipes
description: 3D pipes tileset for testing WFCSolver3D — empty connects to all, pipes connect axis-aligned

tiles.name: pipe-x
tiles.description: X-axis pipe, connects pipe/junction on left/right, empty on others

tiles.name: pipe-y
tiles.description: Y-axis pipe, connects pipe/junction on up/down, empty on others

tiles.name: pipe-z
tiles.description: Z-axis pipe, connects pipe/junction on front/back, empty on others

tiles.name: junction
tiles.description: 6-way junction, connects to any pipe or junction
